case_title: ANTHONY PALERMO VS. FRANCES PATRICIA SWIFT

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PALERMO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT SWIFT, FRANCES PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY PALERMO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FRANCES PATRICIA SWIFT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALERMO, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SWIFT, FRANCES PATRICIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
